options: By placing a '$' symbol before the string
By placing an 'f' character before the quotation marks (f-string)

answer: By placing an 'f' character before the quotation marks (f-string)

options: Deletes the full list variable object completely from system memory
Removes all elements from the list, leaving it completely empty

answer: Removes all elements from the list, leaving it completely empty
